sections.paragraph:
σύνοδος, ου, ἡ (in var. senses: Solon, Hdt., SEG XXIX, 1183 trade assoc.; pap, LXX, Philo, Joseph Ant. 14, 257) assembly, meeting διὰ τί οὐκ ἐφάνης τῇ συνόδῳ ἡμῶν; why did you not come to our assembly? GJs 15:1 (v.l. συναγωγῇ).—M-M.

var. var. = various(ly)

Solon Solon , VII–VI b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

SEG SEG = Supplementum Epigraphicum Graecum—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 973
